title: PreCareBot: 完了/キャンセル数の推移

panels.title: 日次 完了 / キャンセル件数

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  $__timeGroupAlias(completed_at,'1d'),
  SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'COMPLETED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS completed,
  SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'CANCELLED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cancelled
FROM care_requests
WHERE completed_at IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(completed_at)
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1
